name: Manual Image Tool
best_for: Fast style tests, single hero frames, early character exploration
input: copy positive and negative prompts from Panel Factory
output: uploaded image files or external image URLs

name: ComfyUI Worker
best_for: Batch variants, controlled workflows, repeatable style tests, RunPod rendering
input: panel job JSON with prompt, negative prompt, seed, size and variant count
output: generated image variants with file paths

name: Image API Adapter
best_for: Simple hosted generation when local GPU is not available
output: image URLs returned by external service
